name: Donna Webhook Utils
description: Donna webhook utility APIs. These APIs are required for automation platforms to register their endpoints with Donna webhooks and for discovery of available views to listen to. Views are one of the primary ways in which Donna users consume data which work by creating a slice of data using column selection and filters. Donna webhooks allow users to listen to changes in the data generated using a view definition.
